slides.content:
Welcome to Strandveien 112

The building includes 7 rooms and 11 fully equipped apartments.

Move-in / Move-out Procedure

All move-ins and move-outs must be arranged in advance with management. Keys must be handed over directly to management upon departure.

Parking

Do not park in a way that blocks access for the wheel loader during snow clearing in front of the entrance.

Electrical Waste Disposal

Electrical waste can be disposed of free of charge at Elkjøp (down between Elkjøp and the sea).

About Smoking

Smoking is not permitted directly outside the front door. Cigarettes and other trash must not be left at the entrance. Cameras may be installed if necessary.

Important – Cooking & Fire Alarm

Always use the extractor fan when cooking. If the fire alarm is triggered by cooking and there is no fire, you must call 110 immediately to report a false alarm. Failure to do so may result in a NOK 6,500 charge.
Creating a Safe and Respectful Living Environment This applies to both accommodation rigs and apartments.

Zero-tolerance policy

• Bullying and harassment • Discrimination and racism • Gender-based violence • Violence and threats • Substance abuse

Respect for Each Other

• Show consideration • Keep noise levels low • Clean up after yourself • Respect privacy • Be inclusive

Reporting and Support

• Report issues to landlord • Contact HR or whistleblower • Employer is available for support
Together, we create a safe and positive place to live – built on respect, responsibility, and care.
